L1.area: E-commerce checkout and order processing logic

L2.description: An integer overflow or wraparound vulnerability exists where user-submitted form field values are processed without any length constraints, allowing excessively long input strings to cause integer overflow conditions during internal processing.

L3.area: Checkout shipping address handling and validation logic
L3.description: An integer overflow or wraparound vulnerability exists where user-submitted shipping address form field values are processed without any length constraints during the checkout flow, allowing excessively long input strings to cause integer overflow conditions during internal processing.

ground_truth.reason: The shipping address form fields in the checkout flow lack maximum length validation, allowing attackers to submit excessively long strings that cause integer overflow or wraparound during internal processing.
